ga4.gtag_snippet_template:
<!-- Global site tag (gtag.js) - Google Analytics -->
<script async src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/gtag/js?id=MEASUREMENT_ID"></script>
<script>
  window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
  function gtag(){dataLayer.push(arguments);}
  gtag('js', new Date());
  gtag('config', 'MEASUREMENT_ID');
</script>

note: Eyal must create GA4 property and Clarity project, then fill measurement_id and project_id. Implementation of snippets in theme awaits Stage A LOD400 spec from team_100.
